TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}

S.FORM: tangidangida a natjautsikel a qatsa a zaɫum.
S.PHON: taŋidaŋida a nacauʦikəɭ a qaʦa a zaʎum.
S.FORM: tangidangida a natjaucikel a qaca a zaljum.
S.PHON: taŋidaŋida a naʦauʦikəɭ a qaʦa a zaʎum.
S.TRANSL: There is a story of a flood long ago.

S.FORM: matjiɫev a kadjunangan a izua tu nazuanga.
S.PHON: maciʎəv a kaɉunaŋan a izua tu nazuaŋa.
S.FORM: matjiljev a kadjunangan a izua tu nazuanga.
S.PHON: maʦiʎəv a kaɉunaŋan a izua tu nazuaŋa.
S.TRANSL: There were landslides everywhere.

S.FORM: nekanga nu kadjunangan, tsunuq anga sakamaya.
S.PHON: nəkaŋa nu kaɉunaŋan, ʦunuq aŋa sakamaja.
S.FORM: nekanga nu kadjunangan, cunuq anga sakamaya.
S.PHON: nəkaŋa nu kaɉunaŋan, ʦunuq aŋa sakamaja.
S.TRANSL: There was no solid ground left, only scree.

S.FORM: izua maḍusa marekaka nakidjadjas tua ɫagagaz.
S.PHON: izua maɖusa marəkaka nakiɉaɉas tua ʎagagaz.
S.FORM: izua madrusa marekaka nakidjadjas tua ljagagaz.
S.PHON: izua maɖusa marəkaka nakiɉaɉas tua ʎagagaz.
S.TRANSL: There were two siblings who held on to some ɫagagaz grass.

S.FORM: qau azua maḍusa nekanga nu kadjunangan, nekanga nu tapaw; naqemauqaung anga sakamaya.
S.PHON: qau azua maɖusa nəkaŋa nu kaɉunaŋan, nəkaŋa nu tapaw; naqəmauqauŋ aŋa sakamaja.
S.FORM: qau azua madrusa nekanga nu kadjunangan, nekanga nu tapaw; naqemauqaung anga sakamaya.
S.PHON: qau azua maɖusa nəkaŋa nu kaɉunaŋan, nəkaŋa nu tapaw; naqəmauqauŋ aŋa sakamaja.
S.TRANSL: These two had no land any more and no house; they just cried.

S.FORM: palemek a izua qatjulay a ngeḍungeḍuq.
S.PHON: paɭəmək a izua qacuɭaj a ŋəɖuŋəɖuq.
S.FORM: palemek a izua qatjulay a ngedrungedruq.
S.PHON: paɭəmək a izua qaʦuɭaj a ŋəɖuŋəɖuq.
S.TRANSL: It happened that there was half a worm.

S.FORM: qau nu putsaqi a puita, ita vuledan a kadjunangan.
S.PHON: qau nu puʦaqi a puita, ita vuɭədan a kaɉunaŋan.
S.FORM: qau nu pucaqi a puita, ita vuledan a kadjunangan.
S.PHON: qau nu puʦaqi a puita, ita vuɭədan a kaɉunaŋan.
S.TRANSL: Each time it defecated it formed a bit of hill land.

S.FORM: qau djemumak tua pariuk a tsevitseviq anga.
S.PHON: qau ɉəmumak tua pariuk a ʦəviʦəviq aŋa.
S.FORM: qau djemumak tua pariuk a ceviceviq anga.
S.PHON: qau ɉəmumak tua pariuk a ʦəviʦəviq aŋa.
S.TRANSL: They also found part of a wok.

S.FORM: qau zangen niamadju.
S.PHON: qau zaŋən niamaɉu.
S.FORM: qau zangen niamadju.
S.PHON: qau zaŋən niamaɉu.
S.TRANSL: They kept this.

S.FORM: ɫakua neka nu sapuy.
S.PHON: ʎakua nəka nu sapuj.
S.FORM: ljakua neka nu sapuy.
S.PHON: ʎakua nəka nu sapuj.
S.TRANSL: But they had no fire.

S.FORM: qai anga tiamadju.
S.PHON: qai aŋa tiamaɉu.
S.FORM: qai anga tiamadju.
S.PHON: qai aŋa tiamaɉu.
S.TRANSL: They were in a bad way.

S.FORM: "anema tja sapuy?" aya.
S.PHON: "anəma ca sapujʔ" aja.
S.FORM: "anema tja sapuy?" aya.
S.PHON: "anəma ʦa sapuj?" aja.
S.TRANSL: “What are we to do for fire?” they said.

S.FORM: palemek a mangtjez a valalangan, kematsukatsu tua sapui, a kinats a pinadjekets a pitjua djaɫiq.
S.PHON: paɭəmək a maŋcəz a vaɭaɭaŋan, kəmaʦukaʦu tua sapui, a kinaʦ a pinaɉəkəʦ a picua ɉaʎiq.
S.FORM: palemek a mangtjez a valalangan, kemacukacu tua sapui, a kinac a pinadjekec a pitjua djaljiq.
S.PHON: paɭəmək a maŋʦəz a vaɭaɭaŋan, kəmaʦukaʦu tua sapui, a kinaʦ a pinaɉəkəʦ a piʦua ɉaʎiq.
S.TRANSL: It happened that a lizard(?) came along carrying fire on a lighted torch held in its mouth.

S.FORM: qau azua maḍusa a kakeḍian patsunan.
S.PHON: qau azua maɖusa a kakəɖian paʦunan.
S.FORM: qau azua madrusa a kakedrian pacunan.
S.PHON: qau azua maɖusa a kakəɖian paʦunan.
S.TRANSL: The two children saw it.

S.FORM: "anema zua?" aya.
S.PHON: "anəma zuaʔ" aja.
S.FORM: "anema zua?" aya.
S.PHON: "anəma zua?" aja.
S.TRANSL: “What’s that?” they said.

S.FORM: ka djemaɫun i tjayamadju, izua sapuy.
S.PHON: ka ɉəmaʎun i cajamaɉu, izua sapuj.
S.FORM: ka djemaljun i tjayamadju, izua sapuy.
S.PHON: ka ɉəmaʎun i ʦajamaɉu, izua sapuj.
S.TRANSL: When it reached them, it was fire.

S.FORM: qau alapen nua maḍusa a kinatsu nua valalangan.
S.PHON: qau aɭapən nua maɖusa a kinaʦu nua vaɭaɭaŋan.
S.FORM: qau alapen nua madrusa a kinacu nua valalangan.
S.PHON: qau aɭapən nua maɖusa a kinaʦu nua vaɭaɭaŋan.
S.TRANSL: So the two took the torch carried by the lizard.

S.FORM: ka alapen anga nazua maḍusa a sapuy, zazua a valalangan "veng," aya tsemikel.
S.PHON: ka aɭapən aŋa nazua maɖusa a sapuj, zazua a vaɭaɭaŋan "vəŋ," aja ʦəmikəɭ.
S.FORM: ka alapen anga nazua madrusa a sapuy, zazua a valalangan "veng," aya cemikel.
S.PHON: ka aɭapən aŋa nazua maɖusa a sapuj, zazua a vaɭaɭaŋan "vəŋ," aja ʦəmikəɭ.
S.TRANSL: When the two took the fire, the lizard said, “Veng,” and went back again.

S.FORM: kemasi izua tuazua ini anga ka maqevutj a sapuy.
S.PHON: kəmasi izua tuazua ini aŋa ka maqəvuc a sapuj.
S.FORM: kemasi izua tuazua ini anga ka maqevutj a sapuy.
S.PHON: kəmasi izua tuazua ini aŋa ka maqəvuʦ a sapuj.
S.TRANSL: From then on the fire did not go out.

S.FORM: zazua maḍusa meqatsa tiamadju.
S.PHON: zazua maɖusa məqaʦa tiamaɉu.
S.FORM: zazua madrusa meqaca tiamadju.
S.PHON: zazua maɖusa məqaʦa tiamaɉu.
S.TRANSL: These two grew up.

S.FORM: qau azua qatjulay avan azua palidaw tua qipu.
S.PHON: qau azua qacuɭaj avan azua paɭidaw tua qipu.
S.FORM: qau azua qatjulay avan azua palidaw tua qipu.
S.PHON: qau azua qaʦuɭaj avan azua paɭidaw tua qipu.
S.TRANSL: It was the worm which excreted soil.

S.FORM: azua maḍusa patsun tua quma.
S.PHON: azua maɖusa paʦun tua quma.
S.FORM: azua madrusa pacun tua quma.
S.PHON: azua maɖusa paʦun tua quma.
S.TRANSL: The two looked at the fields.

S.FORM: neka nu vurasi, neka nu vasa, neka nu vaqu.
S.PHON: nəka nu vurasi, nəka nu vasa, nəka nu vaqu.
S.FORM: neka nu vurasi, neka nu vasa, neka nu vaqu.
S.PHON: nəka nu vurasi, nəka nu vasa, nəka nu vaqu.
S.TRANSL: There was no sweet potato, taro or millet.

S.FORM: vaivaik anga a pikivangavang.
S.PHON: vaivaik aŋa a pikivaŋavaŋ.
S.FORM: vaivaik anga a pikivangavang.
S.PHON: vaivaik aŋa a pikivaŋavaŋ.
S.TRANSL: They went off for a stroll.

S.FORM: qau djemumak tu tsuvuq nua vurasi katua vasa katua vaqu.
S.PHON: qau ɉəmumak tu ʦuvuq nua vurasi katua vasa katua vaqu.
S.FORM: qau djemumak tu cuvuq nua vurasi katua vasa katua vaqu.
S.PHON: qau ɉəmumak tu ʦuvuq nua vurasi katua vasa katua vaqu.
S.TRANSL: They found shoots of sweet potato, taro and millet;

S.FORM: qau avan anga zazua a kiudaɫen.
S.PHON: qau avan aŋa zazua a kiudaʎən.
S.FORM: qau avan anga zazua a kiudaljen.
S.PHON: qau avan aŋa zazua a kiudaʎən.
S.TRANSL: and that’s how they got things to grow.

S.FORM: zazua maḍusa ka meqatsa tiamadju, "kemuda itjen?" aya kemim tua salasaladj.
S.PHON: zazua maɖusa ka məqaʦa tiamaɉu, "kəmuda icənʔ" aja kəmim tua saɭasaɭaɉ.
S.FORM: zazua madrusa ka meqaca tiamadju, "kemuda itjen?" aya kemim tua salasaladj.
S.PHON: zazua maɖusa ka məqaʦa tiamaɉu, "kəmuda iʦən?" aja kəmim tua saɭasaɭaɉ.
S.TRANSL: When these two grew up, they said “What are we to do?” and looked for mates.

S.FORM: neka nu patsunan a tsautsau.
S.PHON: nəka nu paʦunan a ʦauʦau.
S.FORM: neka nu pacunan a caucau.
S.PHON: nəka nu paʦunan a ʦauʦau.
S.TRANSL: They couldn’t see any people.

S.FORM: tiamadju anga mapuvaɫaw a marekaka.
S.PHON: tiamaɉu aŋa mapuvaʎaw a marəkaka.
S.FORM: tiamadju anga mapuvaljaw a marekaka.
S.PHON: tiamaɉu aŋa mapuvaʎaw a marəkaka.
S.TRANSL: So those siblings married one another.

S.FORM: sangasan a puaɫak matseviq, mavutsa, mataiɫ.
S.PHON: saŋasan a puaʎak maʦəviq, mavuʦa, mataiʎ.
S.FORM: sangasan a pualjak maceviq, mavuca, matailj.
S.PHON: saŋasan a puaʎak maʦəviq, mavuʦa, mataiʎ.
S.TRANSL: Their first child was disabled, blind and missing limbs and organs.

S.FORM: ka sika masan musaɫ nanguaq anga a pagaɫu nu puaɫak.
S.PHON: ka sika masan musaʎ naŋuaq aŋa a pagaʎu nu puaʎak.
S.FORM: ka sika masan musalj nanguaq anga a pagalju nu pualjak.
S.PHON: ka sika masan musaʎ naŋuaq aŋa a pagaʎu nu puaʎak.
S.TRANSL: The second child was rather better.

S.FORM: ka sika masan tjeluɫ nanguaq anga; a puaɫak ini anga ka mavutsa, ini anga ka mataiɫ.
S.PHON: ka sika masan cəɭuʎ naŋuaq aŋa; a puaʎak ini aŋa ka mavuʦa, ini aŋa ka mataiʎ.
S.FORM: ka sika masan tjelulj nanguaq anga; a pualjak ini anga ka mavuca, ini anga ka matailj.
S.PHON: ka sika masan ʦəɭuʎ naŋuaq aŋa; a puaʎak ini aŋa ka mavuʦa, ini aŋa ka mataiʎ.
S.TRANSL: The third was all right, not blind and not missing any limbs.

S.FORM: qau avan anga zazua kakeɫangan tu inika puvaɫaw tua kaka; masa palisi, ayanga a tjautsikel.
S.PHON: qau avan aŋa zazua kakəʎaŋan tu inika puvaʎaw tua kaka; masa paɭisi, ajaŋa a cauʦikəɭ.
S.FORM: qau avan anga zazua kakeljangan tu inika puvaljaw tua kaka; masa palisi, ayanga a tjaucikel.
S.PHON: qau avan aŋa zazua kakəʎaŋan tu inika puvaʎaw tua kaka; masa paɭisi, ajaŋa a ʦauʦikəɭ.
S.TRANSL: So that’s how they knew not to marry siblings, perhaps (because) it’s taboo, according to the story.
